function.message: I can’t complete that capture request because it requires ingesting content from an external website domain (docs.anthropic.com), which is blocked by the security policy.
function.rulebook_notes: System rulebook requires DENIED_SECURITY for requests to capture/ingest content from external websites or URLs to avoid prompt-injection risk.
function.outcome_justification: The user asked to capture a snippet from docs.anthropic.com. The active safety policy explicitly requires refusing external website ingestion and reporting OUTCOME_DENIED_SECURITY.
